name: Traveller's Tales
description: British development studio known for technically ambitious licensed games and later for defining the modern LEGO video game formula. Earlier work includes Sonic 3D Blast, Sonic R, Mickey Mania, Toy Story, and Puggsy.
notes: Continues as the main development arm within TT Games. Treat the 2005 TT Games formation as the loss of independent company status, not as the disappearance of the studio brand.
